leagueBriefing: Team Penske owned the spotlight at Phoenix as Josef Newgarden capped a perfect team weekend with a furious late charge to victory, while strategy swings and cautions kept the field in constant flux.

games.headline: Newgarden storms from 10th on late restart to win thriller at Phoenix
games.brief: Josef Newgarden delivered one of the drives of the season at Phoenix Raceway, slicing from 10th on a late restart to take the lead with seven laps remaining and secure his 33rd IndyCar career win. Team Penske's pace was evident all weekend, with pole-sitter David Malukas completing a double-podium day in third, while Kyle Kirkwood chased Newgarden home in second. Multiple cautions, strategy pivots, and late-race contact reshuffled the order repeatedly before Newgarden's fresh-tire charge settled the Good Ranchers 250.
bullets: Josef Newgarden won by 1.77937s over Kyle Kirkwood after taking the lead with seven laps to go.
Pole-sitter David Malukas finished third to complete a strong Team Penske result.
Christian Rasmussen briefly led late but faded to 14th after contact and damage concerns.
Will Power and Rasmussen collided on Lap 206, triggering a decisive late caution.
Pato O'Ward recovered to fourth after a late stop, while Marcus Armstrong rounded out the top five.
games.context: Newgarden's first win of 2026 reinforces Penske as the early benchmark and adds momentum heading into the next oval stretch.
